content.claim: Tankerületi centers continue to apply efficiency and enrollment ratios as criteria for closing small village schools, as documented in 2022 closure decisions in the Sopron region.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Hungarian education system lens
limitations: Sample of documented cases is small and regionally specific
Does not establish whether efficiency ratios are mandated or discretionary within tankerület practice
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
